mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO tb_browse_history (id, user_id, article_id, browse_at) VALUES
(#{item.id}, #{item.userId}, #{item.articleId}, #{item.browseAt})
ON CONFLICT (user_id, article_id) DO UPDATE SET browse_at = EXCLUDED.browse_at
mapper.select: SELECT bh.article_id AS articleId, a.title AS articleTitle, a.cover AS articleCover, a.summary, u.nickname AS authorName, u.avatar AS authorAvatar, a.created_at AS createdAt, bh.browse_at AS browseTime, CASE WHEN a.id IS NULL OR a.is_deleted = true THEN true ELSE false END AS isDeleted FROM tb_browse_history bh LEFT JOIN tb_article a ON bh.article_id = a.id LEFT JOIN tb_user u ON a.author_id = u.id WHERE bh.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY bh.browse_at DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_browse_history WHERE user_id = #{userId}
